Sun Zhao еӯ«иӮҮ
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sun Zhao (еӯ«иӮҮ). Sent to join the forces of Ma Teng and Liu YanвҖҷs sons against Li Jue with a small force. Sun Zhao was affiliated with Liu Yan.
